scenes.title: Demo scenes are live
scenes.subtitle: Static example feed for previews and smoke tests
body: host renders scenes and schedules them into 4 hardware slots
Paperclip can plug in later through a provider adapter
typography-first layouts tuned for monochrome ePaper

scenes.title: Demo bulletin
scenes.subtitle: static sample copy
items: this example feed is static and is meant for previews, smoke tests, and demos
swap in a real JSON feed or remote provider when you want live operational content
slot zero is the front page, not a rotating carousel controller
use `reterminal publish --push --watch --live` with a provider manifest for production

scenes.title: Build a tiny publishing system, not a pile of fixed pages.
scenes.subtitle: Providers fetch signals. Renderers make scenes. The scheduler owns the four slots.
